items.title: Why Canada has generic Ozempic, and the US doesn't
items.dek: Canada is the first G7 country to approve the lower cost weight-loss drugs, which are rolling out in pharmacies this month.
items.body: Canada is the first G7 country to approve the lower cost weight-loss drugs, which are rolling out in pharmacies this month.

items.title: Costly fuel pushes more Indians to buy electric cars but challenges remain
items.dek: High fuel prices are strengthening the case for EV adoption in the world's third largest auto market.
